title: gnaphalium sylvaticum var. subarcticum
intro: Gnaphalium sylvaticum var. subarcticum, also known as Arctic Cudweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and swelling, as well as its potential to aid in the healing of minor cuts and scrapes. Gnaphalium sylvaticum var. subarcticum can be prepared as a topical salve, ointment, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various skin and wound-related issues.
